title: Join the Team
description: Career opportunities at Financial Edge - Nigeria's leading financial news platform.
html:
Join Our Team

Financial Edge is Nigeria's most reliable financial newsletter, providing real-time intelligence across sectors. We're always looking for talented individuals who are passionate about financial journalism, data analysis, and digital media.

Why Work With Us?

  • Impactful Work: Shape the narrative around Nigeria's financial markets and economy
  • Growth Opportunities: Develop your skills in a dynamic, fast-paced environment
  • Collaborative Culture: Work with experienced professionals in finance and journalism
  • Market Leadership: Be part of Nigeria's leading financial news platform

Current Openings

We are currently reviewing applications for the following roles:

Financial Reporter

We're seeking experienced reporters to cover capital markets, money markets, energy, and agro business sectors.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Journalism, Finance, Economics, or related field
  • 2+ years of reporting experience
  • Strong understanding of Nigerian financial markets
  • Excellent writing and communication skills

Content Editor

Join our editorial team to ensure the highest standards of financial journalism.

Requirements:

  • 3+ years of editorial experience
  • Strong attention to detail
  • Knowledge of financial terminology and markets
  • Ability to work under tight deadlines

Digital Marketing Specialist

Help us grow our audience and engagement across digital platforms.

Requirements:

  • Experience with social media marketing
  • Knowledge of SEO and content strategy
  • Analytics and data-driven mindset
  • Creative approach to audience growth

How to Apply

To apply for any of these positions, please send your CV and a cover letter to:

Email: careers@financialedge.com.ng

Include the position title in the subject line of your email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interviews.
